title: Elastic (ESTC) Valuation in Focus After Upbeat Earnings and Raised Outlook
text: Elastic's valuation came into focus following strong Q3 FY2026 earnings results and raised full-year guidance. Valuation Analysis: Current trading price reflects significant discount to historical valuations. Analyst price targets range from $75 to $130, with a median around $106-$107. Fair value estimates vary significantly based on AI monetization assumptions. Forward P/E ratio of approximately 16.4x based on raised FY2026 EPS guidance. Forward Revenue Multiple: Trading at approximately 8.9x forward revenue based on raised FY2026 guidance. Historical median multiple for SaaS companies around 7-8x, suggesting modest premium justified by growth and margin expansion. Growth Metrics: Revenue growth of 17% at midpoint of FY2026 guidance. Subscription revenue growth of 20% at midpoint. Operating margin expansion to 16.3% full-year. Earnings Growth: EPS growth significantly exceeding revenue growth due to operating leverage. Full-year EPS guidance of $2.50-$2.54 implies 30%+ growth. AI Growth Tailwind: AI monetization expected to accelerate beyond current 5% tailwind as penetration increases. Risk-Reward Assessment: Upside case if AI adoption accelerates faster than expected, driving subscription growth acceleration. Downside risks include macro uncertainty and public sector spending pressure.
